narrative:
Precinct Londonderry/Washington (precinct in Guernsey County) has 621 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.0 percentage points.
